ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the study began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the study ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution conducting the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contact regarding the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the variable belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of field (e.g., text, checkbox, radio) */,
  "field_label" TEXT /* Label for the field */,
  "choices" TEXT /* Choices or options for the field */,
  "field_note" TEXT /* Note or description for the field */,
  "cde_reference" TEXT /* CDE reference for the variable */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the variable is required */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* JSON object containing validation rules */,
  "branching_logic" TEXT /* JSON object containing branching logic rules */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the variable */,
  "order_in_form" INTEGER /* Order in which the variable appears in the form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the response belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who provided the response */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the response is for */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was submitted */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response */,
  "response_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant is in */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant enrolled in the study */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the participant withdrew from the study */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* JSON object containing medical history */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the participant has signed the consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_studies" (
  "user_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-study relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "role_in_study" TEXT /* Role of the user in the study (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions for the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_studies_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_studies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
